mapper.select: /* ExhibitionMapper.getAdminExhibitionDetail: 기획전 상세 조회 */ SELECT EB.EXHIBITION_NO , EB.EXHIBITION_NM , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_END_DT , EB.LIST_VIEW_YN AS LIST_SHOW_YN , EB.VIEW_YN , EB.THUMBNAIL_URL , EB.EXHIBITION_PC_DESC , EB.EXHIBITION_MO_DESC FROM EXHIBITION_BASE EB WHERE EB.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND EB.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* ExhibitionMapper.getExhibitionTabList: 기획전 탭 목록 조회 */ SELECT EXHIBITION_TAB_NO , EXHIBITION_NO , TAB_NM , DISP_ORD , SHOW_YN , DEL_YN , REG_NO , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , UDT_NO , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM EXHIBITION_TAB WHERE EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, EXHIBITION_TAB_NO ASC
